text:
It was Christmas morning. The kids woke up early. They searched everywhere. They even checked under beds. They found nothing. A sad day. It didn't matter. They decorated. They hung ornaments. They sang songs. They watched movies. They cheered.

And then they decorated snowmen. They found some old plastic ones. They carved sticks. They painted.

There they were. Life.
